nws.name: Overnight
nws.detailedForecast: Rain and a chance of thunderstorms. Cloudy, with a low around 44. East wind around 14 mph, with gusts as high as 20 mph. Chance of precipitation is 100%. New rainfall amounts between a half and three quarters of an inch possible.

nws.name: Thursday
nws.detailedForecast: Rain and a chance of thunderstorms before 3pm. Mostly cloudy. High near 56, with temperatures falling to around 54 in the afternoon. North wind 13 to 17 mph, with gusts as high as 24 mph. Chance of precipitation is 90%. New rainfall amounts between 1 and 2 inches possible.

nws.name: Thursday Night
nws.detailedForecast: Partly cloudy. Low around 37, with temperatures rising to around 39 overnight. North northeast wind 6 to 14 mph. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

nws.name: Friday
nws.detailedForecast: Rain between 7am and 1pm, then rain likely and a chance of thunderstorms. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 58. Northeast wind 14 to 17 mph, with gusts as high as 24 mph. Chance of precipitation is 80%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.

nws.name: Friday Night
nws.detailedForecast: Rain likely and a chance of thunderstorms before 1am. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 33. Northwest wind 14 to 17 mph, with gusts as high as 23 mph. Chance of precipitation is 70%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.

nws.name: Saturday
nws.detailedForecast: Partly sunny, with a high near 51. West northwest wind 17 to 24 mph, with gusts as high as 35 mph.

nws.name: Saturday Night
nws.detailedForecast: Mostly clear, with a low around 30. Northwest wind 6 to 21 mph, with gusts as high as 28 mph.

nws.name: Sunday
nws.detailedForecast: Sunny, with a high near 61. Northwest wind 6 to 10 mph, with gusts as high as 16 mph.

nws.name: Sunday Night
nws.detailedForecast: Mostly clear, with a low around 35. North northwest wind 5 to 9 mph.

nws.name: Monday
nws.detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain after 7am. Partly sunny, with a high near 55. North northeast wind 6 to 10 mph, with gusts as high as 18 mph.

nws.name: Monday Night
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of rain. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 31. Northeast wind around 10 mph, with gusts as high as 17 mph.

nws.name: Tuesday
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of rain. Partly sunny, with a high near 57. East southeast wind 12 to 18 mph, with gusts as high as 28 mph.

nws.name: Tuesday Night
nws.detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain. Partly cloudy, with a low around 42. South southeast wind around 17 mph, with gusts as high as 26 mph.
